title: Terms and Conditions
bodyHtml:
Welcome to Back Market!

 

Here you’ll find the updated file version of the Sellers’ Terms and Conditions. 

 

The last updated Sellers’ Terms and Conditions go into effect on 30 March, 2026 to simplify Back Market payment fee structure by replacing variable fees with a standard 1% blended payment fee.

 

Signed Terms and Conditions are now available for new sellers in the Back Office, under Business Profile.

 

Note that you still have access to previous versions of the Terms and Conditions here.
